component.description: High accuracy 3V to 17V 2A step-down converter with DCS-Control

absolute_maximum_ratings.parameter: Switch and output sense voltage range

absolute_maximum_ratings.raw_name: EN, MODE, FSEL, PG, FB, SS/TR

electrical_characteristics.conditions: EN = high, IOUT= 0 mA, Device not switching, TJ= 85 °C
EN = high, IOUT= 0 mA, Device not switching
EN = 0 V, Nominal value at TJ= 25 °C, Max value at TJ= 85 °C

electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Input Leakage Current for EN, FSEL, MODE
Power Good Threshold Voltage; dc level
Power Good Threshold Voltage; dc level

electrical_characteristics.conditions: VIN ≥ VOUT + 1 V; VOUT ≥ 1.5 V; PFM mode; Co,eff ≥ 47 µF, L = 1 µH for FSEL = high, L = 1.5 µH for FSEL = low
1 V ≤ VOUT < 1.5 V; PFM mode; Co,eff ≥ 47 µF, L = 1 µH for FSEL = high, L = 1.5 µH for FSEL = low
VOUT < 1 V; PFM mode; Co,eff ≥ 75 µF, L = 1 µH for FSEL = high, L = 1.5 µH for FSEL = low

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Feedback Voltage Accuracy with Voltage Tracking
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Feedback Voltage Accuracy with Voltage Tracking
electrical_characteristics.conditions: VIN ≥ VOUT + 1 V; VSS/TR = 0.35 V; PWM mode
PWM mode operation, IOUT= 1 A, VIN ≥ VOUT + 1 V or VIN ≥ 3.5 V whichever is larger
IO= 0 mA, Time from EN=high to start switching; VIN applied already
IO= 0 mA, Time from first switching pulse until 95% of nominal output voltage; device not in current limit

pin_definitions.description: Power supply input. Make sure the input capacitor is connected as close as possible between pin VIN and GND.
Switch pin of the converter connected to the internal Power MOSFETs.
Voltage feedback input. Connect resistive output voltage divider to this pin.
Output voltage sense pin. Connect directly to the positive pin of the output capacitor.
Open drain power good output. Leave open or tie to GND if not used.
Enable pin of the device. Connect to logic low to disable the device. Pull high to enable the device. Do not leave this pin unconnected.

Soft-start / Tracking pin. An external capacitor connected from this pin to GND defines the rise time for the internal reference voltage. The pin can also be used as an input for tracking and sequencing.
The device runs in PFM/PWM mode when this pin is pulled low. When the pin is pulled high, the device runs in forced PWM mode. Do not leave this pin unconnected.
Switching frequency setting pin. Pull to logic low for a switching frequency of 1.25 MHz. Pull to logic high for a switching frequency of 2.5 MHz. Do not leave FSEL unconnected.

logical_pins.description: Voltage feedback input. Connect resistive output voltage divider to this pin.

logical_pins.name: VOS
logical_pins.description: Output voltage sense pin. Connect directly to the positive pin of the output capacitor.

logical_pins.name: PG
logical_pins.description: Open drain power good output. Leave open or tie to GND if not used.

logical_pins.name: EN
logical_pins.description: Enable pin of the device. Connect to logic low to disable the device. Pull high to enable the device. Do not leave this pin unconnected.

logical_pins.name: SS/TR
logical_pins.description: Soft-start / Tracking pin. An external capacitor connected from this pin to GND defines the rise time for the internal reference voltage.

logical_pins.name: MODE
logical_pins.description: The device runs in PFM/PWM mode when this pin is pulled low. When the pin is pulled high, the device runs in forced PWM mode. Do not leave this pin unconnected.

logical_pins.name: FSEL
logical_pins.description: Switching frequency setting pin. Pull to logic low for 1.25 MHz. Pull to logic high for 2.5 MHz. Do not leave FSEL unconnected.
